title: Create: New Tempest
description: Create: New Tempest aims to bring Create mod functionality to the world of Tensura: Reincarnated. It’s a new, exciting way to combine the magical world of Tensura with the mechanical world of Create, adding compatibility between the two mods.
body:
This compatibility mod bridges the creative ingenuity of Create and the immersive world-building of Tensura: Reincarnated, offering players a seamless blend of aesthetic automation, engineering, and magical storytelling.

Features
New Mechanical Race: 
A powerful mechanical race built for resilience and complex mechanisms.
Strengths: High durability and better ability to work with create items.
Weakness: A significant vulnerability to water.

The evolution line starts with Mechanical Construct which then goes into 3 evolution paths so far
1. Mechanical Giant -> Mechanical Colossus -> Mechanical Titan
2. Mechanical Novice -> Mechanical Expert -> Mechanical Scholar
3. Mechanical Combatant -> Mechanical Soldier -> Mechanical Warrior

Intrinsic Skills for Mechanical Construct:

Mechanical Eye - Grants unparalleled insight into intricate mechanisms when toggled on.

Mechanical Hands- Activating this skill provides unmatched precision in manipulating complex machinery, enabling effortless rotation or disassembly of mechanical structures.

Evolution Skills

-Overclock(Mechanical Combatant)

-Mechanical Body(Mechanical Novice)

-Augment Frame(Mechanical Giant)

By combining the engineering ingenuity of Create with the expansive magical universe of Tensura: Reincarnated, this mod delivers an innovative gameplay experience filled with creative automation and immersive storytelling.
